arts.sum: A January deal looks like it's edging closer for Tierney while Brendan Rodgers issues Sondre Orjasaeter update

arts.sum: Speculation mounts around winger linked with Celtic as Aberdeen midfielder is tracked by Edinburgh clubs.

arts.ttl: What channel is Aston Villa vs Celtic? Live stream, TV, ref, VAR and team news for vital Champions League clash
arts.sum: A packed to the rafters Villa Park will provide a perfect backdrop with Brendan Rodgers' men looking for a miracle to make it into the last 16 automatically

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about defensive crisis, 'Battle of Britain' Celtic clash & McGinn relationship
arts.sum: Tomorrow is a very good opportunity against Celtic to enjoy it here and I know this is a rival match for our supporters as well. It is fantastic to play against teams like Celtic.

arts.ttl: Champions League permuations as Liverpool, Arsenal, Man City and Aston Villa face decisive matches
arts.sum: The final fixtures of the group stage of the 2025 Champions League take place on Wednesday evening and with every side set to be in action throughout the evening, plenty could still happen

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo has shared what he told Jota after he returned to Celtic
arts.sum: But Bernardo is excited to see Jota return and he labelled the versatile forward as a ‘great player’, as he told Celtic TV in his pre-match press conference for the Villa match. Bernardo explained that he told his fellow countryman that if he needed anything, then ‘I can help’ because, when the midfielder first came to Celtic, Jota sent him a similar message.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Celtic: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today
arts.sum: Aston Villa could still finish in the top eight of the league phase

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton and John Hartson react to news of Kieran Tierney's return to Celtic
arts.sum: Chris Sutton and John Hartson delighted as Kieran Tierney is set for Celtic return Brendan Rodgers has confirmed Kieran Tierney will return to Celtic, it’s just a case of when the Arsenal star will don the green and white colours again.

arts.ttl: Jota's iconic Celtic song found Paulo Bernardo BEFORE he joined Hoops and now he's ready to turn up the volume
arts.sum: The Portuguese stars are set to team up at last in Glasgow's East End

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers’ record v Aston Villa will make Celtic fans feel confident for Champions League clash
arts.sum: From beating Villa’s Emery the last time he met him when Rodgers’ Leicester City side recorded a 4-2 win at Villa Park in 2023 to that infamous 7-1 defeat when PSG beat Celtic in 2017. This will be the first meeting between Celtic and Villa, but it won’t be the first time Brendan Rodgers has faced Unai Emery.
